core_principles: Trust-Inspiring but Modern: Avoid bureaucratic boredom using asymmetric layouts and generous spacing.
Indian Nuance: Tasteful integration of Saffron, White, and Green without being overwhelming or tacky.
Progressive Disclosure: Hide complexity. Use 'I Need To' task-based navigation.
AI as a Partner: Chat companion should feel native, not like a bolted-on widget.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] font-black

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-16). Avoid standard Bootstrap columns.
layout_spacing.grid_bento: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8. Mix spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4) to create tension and asymmetry.
layout_spacing.corners: rounded-2xl for major cards, rounded-full for chips and buttons.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
surface_styles.inputs: bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 focus:border-[#E05D36] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E05D36] rounded-xl

hero_background.description: Vibrant geometric architecture mimicking abstract saffron/green tones, used subtly with low opacity or as a masking layer on the hero.

monument_texture.description: Rashtrapati Bhavan view, used for the footer or statistics counter section background with a heavy #0B132B navy overlay (bg-[#0B132B]/90).

header.style: Glassmorphism sticky header (z-50). Includes English/Hindi Language Toggle prominently. Asymmetric logo placement.

hero_section.layout: Left-aligned heavy typography. H1 using Cabinet Grotesk. Right side uses a Bento Grid overlapping layout featuring 'AI Chat' and 'Complaint Tracker' floating cards.
hero_section.background: Warm linen background (#FAF9F6) with subtle grainy noise texture.

ai_chat_companion.container: Standalone page or split-screen dashboard layout.
ai_chat_companion.user_bubble: bg-[#0B132B] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 text-sm
ai_chat_companion.ai_bubble: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 text-sm
ai_chat_companion.chips: Quick-prompt chips for 'Apply Aadhaar', 'Track Complaint' etc. rounded-full border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:border-[#E05D36] hover:text-[#E05D36] text-xs py-2 px-4 transition-colors

complaint_submission.form: Progressive disclosure form. Use Shadcn forms. Clear steps.
complaint_submission.tracker_timeline: Vertical stepper layout using Emerald Green (#1C7C54) for completed steps and Saffron (#E05D36) for 'In Progress'. Gray for pending. 1px solid connecting lines.

service_finder.ui: 'Who Are You?' profile card (Age, Occupation, State). Results displayed in a dense grid of cards (Swiss styling, sharp lines, subtle hover lift).

document_guidance.ui: Checklist style layout with Lucide icons. Left aligned, generous spacing between list items.

statistics_counter.ui: Dark mode strip. bg-[#0B132B] text-white. Massive typography for numbers (text-5xl or 6xl). Monospace font for digits (JetBrains Mono) for a 'live data' feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or standard Sans. Import fonts via Fontshare CDN in index.html: <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,900&f[]=satoshi@900,700,500,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
Configure Tailwind theme to map 'font-heading' to Cabinet Grotesk and 'font-sans' to Satoshi.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for Landing page sections to achieve bento grid asymmetry. Do not force Shadcn 'Card' into landing page layouts where flexibility is needed.
For all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, language toggles, chat send, tabs), you MUST add data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='lang-toggle-btn').
Never use generic purple/teal gradients. Stick strictly to the Saffron/Navy/Green/Linen palette defined.
Forms and complex state components MUST use Shadcn (Form, Input, Select, Dialog). Overwrite default Shadcn radius to match rounded-xl or rounded-2xl where necessary.
Add 'framer-motion' (yarn add framer-motion) for micro-animations: hover lift on service cards, staggered fade-in for chat bubbles, smooth page transitions.
Implement the Language Toggle logic to show immediate structural capability (mock translate primary headings to Hindi to impress judges).
